Package neqsim.process.chemistry.hydrate

Class ThermodynamicHydrateInhibitorPerformance

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.hydrate.ThermodynamicHydrateInhibitorPerformance
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ThermodynamicHydrateInhibitorPerformance extends Object implements Serializable
Performance model for thermodynamic hydrate inhibitors (THI) — MEG, MeOH, DEG, EG.

Two complementary calculations:

  1. Hammerschmidt — engineering screening estimate of the wt% inhibitor in the water phase required to suppress the hydrate equilibrium temperature by a target dT. Recommended only for first-pass sizing; for FEED use a NeqSim hydrate flash.
  2. Required injection rate — given the produced-water rate and a target lean/rich split, returns the kg/h of neat inhibitor.

For rigorous suppression the recommended path is to use NeqSim's HydrateInhibitorConcentrationFlash; this class provides the screening result and standards traceability used by the compatibility and RCA layers.

Reference: Hammerschmidt 1934, GPSA Engineering Data Book Section 20.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
